description: The chart's title claims to show quarterly profit from 2023–2026 but only displays data from Q2 2024 through Q1 2026—a period where Technology profit shows a dramatic rise from ~$6,000 to ~$16,000 and then a sharp drop, while Furniture appears relatively flat and low. This cherry-picked window omits the earlier quarters (Q1 2023–Q1 2024) where the two categories were much closer in profit and Technology's growth was less dramatic, as well as the later quarters (Q2 2026–Q4 2026) where Technology surges to nearly $19,000, making the selected endpoint look like a decline rather than a temporary dip.
